title: Catspaw (disambiguation)
content:
'''''Catspaw''''' has been the title of two ''[[Star Wars]]'' [[Star Wars comic books|comic books]]:
*'''''[[Star Wars (1977) 93|Catspaw]]''''', the ninety-third issue in the [[Marvel Comics|Marvel]] [[Star Wars (1977)|''Star Wars'']] comic series
*'''''[[Jedi: Shaak Ti]]''''', which was retitled as '''''Catspaw''''' for its collection in ''[[Star Wars: Clone Wars Volume 2: Victories and Sacrifices]]''
